name: Tang Tang Tang Tang Tang Tang Kelentang
lore:
Lore of Tang Tang Tang Tang Tang Tang Kelentang
                                    


Tang Tang Tang Tang Tang Tang Kelentang is a metal debt book holding a baseball bat and a megaphone with red eyes. He is known to be Tung Tung Sahur's rival, and he also has a baseball bat.
Lyrics
Original (Indonesian)
TANG TANG TANG TANG TANG KELENTANG, Bayar utang kau binatang! Anomali Tang Tang Kelentang tercipta secara tidak sengaja dari rasa muak orang-orang yang penagih hutang. Bukannya beliau ni tak punya uang, tapi si binatang ini memang tak mau bayar hutang, setiap ditagih, selalu bilang "besok, besok, besok, besok aku belum punya uang" tapi muncungnya berasaplah binatang beli rokok bisa bayar utang tak mau. Heeeeiiii, betua punya kawan. padahal kalau dicicil seribu, seribu setiap minggu selama 2 bulan hutangnya sudah lunaslah sial. Sudah 3 tahun si binatang ini tak bayar utang tang tang tang Kelentang. Share ke kepala bapak dia atok dia nenek dia muak
Translated (English):
Tang Tang Tang Tang Tang Kelentang, Pay your debt you animal! The Tang Tang Kelentang anomaly was created accidentally from the disgust of debt collectors. It's not that he doesn't have money, but this animal doesn't want to pay his debt, every time he's asked, he always says "tomorrow, tomorrow, tomorrow, tomorrow I don't have money yet" but his snout smokes the animal can buy cigarettes to pay his debt but doesn't want to. Heeeeiiii, old people have friends. even though if it was paid in installments of a thousand. Pay Your fucking Debt! Pay It!.
Translated (Malaysia)
Tang Tang Tang Tang Kelentang, Bayar hutangmu wahai binatang! Anomali Tang Tang Kelentang tercipta secara tidak sengaja daripada rasa jijik pemungut hutang. Bukan dia tak ada duit, tapi binatang ni tak nak bayar hutang, setiap kali dia tanya, dia selalu cakap "esok, esok, esok, esok takde duit lagi" tapi muncungnya menghisap binatang tu boleh beli rokok untuk bayar hutang tapi tak nak. Heeeeiii, orang tua ada kawan. padahal kalau dibayar secara ansuran seribu, seribu setiap minggu selama 2 bulan hutang sudah terbayar, sial. Haiwan ini sudah 3 tahun tidak membayar hutang tang tang tang Kelentang. Bagilah dengan kepala ayah dia atau nenek dia dah muak
Translated (Italian)
Tang Tang Tang Tang Kelentang, paga il tuo debito, animale! L'anomalia di Tang Tang Kelentang è stata creata accidentalmente dal disgusto degli esattori. Non è che non abbia soldi, ma questo animale non vuole pagare il suo debito, ogni volta che gli viene chiesto, dice sempre "domani, domani, domani, domani non ho ancora soldi", ma il suo muso fuma. L'animale può comprare le sigarette per pagare il suo debito ma non vuole. Ehiiii, gli anziani hanno degli amici. Anche se fosse stato pagato a rate da mille, mille ogni settimana per 2 mesi, il debito sarebbe stato saldato, dannazione. Questo animale non ha pagato il suo debito Tang Tang Tang Kelentang per 3 anni. Condividilo con il capo di suo padre o con sua nonna, ne ha abbastanza.
